motivation.author: Chat GPT
motivation.quote: Exams can be stressful and challenging, but it's important to remember that they are an opportunity to demonstrate what you've learned and to gain recognition for your hard work and dedication. Here are a few things to keep in mind to help stay motivated: Set specific, achievable goals for yourself. Break up your study sessions into manageable chunks. Reward yourself when you achieve a goal. Surround yourself with supportive people. Keep things in perspective - remember that one exam does not define your worth as a person. Believe in yourself, you have worked hard to get here. Keep a positive mindset and focus on the benefits of doing well on the exams. Remember that you have the ability to succeed, you can do it. Good luck on your exams!

motivation.author: anonymous but in orange
motivation.quote: Imagine the smile in your parents face when they see your result. Yeah, I know for some these results wouldn't matter much (I'm one of them) still just do it for your parents!
